scope_note: QA Red Group Cert family [126]: certifies that the QA T-operator is a red isometry (split-complex rotation by phi in Z[sqrt(5)]/mZ[sqrt(5)]); the red T-matrix for phi is [[1,5],[1,1]] (mod m); orbit period = order of T in the red isometry group mod m; checks: matrix entries, determinant = -4 (red norm of phi = 1-5 = -4), orbit period by direct iteration, and the 3-orbit structure (cosmos period 24, satellite period 8, singularity period 1) for m=9. Source: Wildberger arXiv:math/0701338 (1D Metrical Geometry), QA mathematical structure.
